textByHash.9776fbe0c6a180ee65f3a1c32bc3926195f91ac3: I'm just looking at the magic trees. I think they're cool.
textByHash.27cca492436c4a8434fa8d407f99c2be7be78f42: When I grow up I want to chop down trees and make magic bows. Then I'd be rich.
textByHash.9559a2f83eee96004738c6d78e8802d4010c9ae6: Hee Hee Hee. It worked! Thanks mister.
